query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view showing two bright lights at the upper edge casting purple and pink hues downward across a dark, textured surface. A dim blue rectangular shape is visible near the center, surrounded by deep shadow that fills the lower portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred, grainy night scene featuring two overexposed lights at the top edge that streak purple and pink reflections across the frame. A central blue rectangular form is smeared and devoid of detail, dissolving into the underexposed shadows below. The image employs heavy film-like noise and extreme blur to create an abstract, atmospheric composition that feels oppressive and dreamlike, with representational clarity abandoned in favor of texture and tonal mood.
